legacy.content:
# Phase 41-01 Summary - Content Pack Release Artifacts
## Completed - Added `packages/engine/scripts/build-content-pack-release-artifacts.mjs`. - Added package script alias: `build:content-pack-release-artifacts`. - Updated workflows: - `.github/workflows/engine-package-release.yml` - `.github/workflows/docs-browser-game.yml` - New artifacts now include bundle/report/index content-pack outputs.
